profile.name: Rishu Gupta
profile.bio: B.Tech CSE Undergraduate (2022–2026) at Siliguri Institute of Technology. Specializing in real-time synchronized systems, scalable backend architectures, and AI-powered solutions. Dedicated to building efficient, user-centric digital products.

projects.title: SYNC SOCIAL VIDEO
projects.synopsis: Real-time synchronized video streaming platform with room-based architecture.
projects.description: Engineered a high-performance video synchronization engine. Implemented live synchronization for shared viewing experiences using Socket.io and Firebase. Integrated AI-powered suggestions via Genkit for a seamless social experience.

projects.title: ECOMM NEXUS
projects.synopsis: Complete shopping platform with secure payments and optimized database performance.
projects.description: Developed a robust MERN stack application featuring JWT authentication, Stripe integration, and high-performance MongoDB indexing for sub-second query responses under heavy load.

projects.title: DSA PREP HUB
projects.synopsis: Intelligent learning platform with personalized study plans and AI code analysis.
projects.description: Built using Google Gemini API to explain complex algorithmic concepts and debug code. Features a persistent tracking dashboard for real-time student progress monitoring.
